boundary_binding.action_boundary: May procurement execute the controlled-solvent purchase?
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: The execution release (REL-AST-081) precisely matches the action boundary's requirements: material (AS-44), quantity band (0-20 liter), facility (R9), PO (PO-AST-081), and active cabinet/handler controls. The generic warning (WARN-AST-081) does not introduce a new, unaddressed requirement beyond what REL-AST-081 confirms.
boundary_binding.controlling_source_fact: Execution release REL-AST-081 confirms active cabinet/handler controls and all other specified parameters for the controlled-solvent purchase.
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: The action boundary is closed as all conditions for controlled-solvent purchase are met and verified by REL-AST-081 prior to execution.

final_answer: The controlled-solvent purchase may proceed. The execution release (REL-AST-081) precisely matches the action boundary's requirements, including material, quantity band, facility, PO, and active cabinet/handler controls. The generic safety warning (WARN-AST-081) does not introduce an unaddressed requirement, as the release confirms the necessary hazard-control status. The source boundary is now closed.
